expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: In result.md, both focus areas are explicitly addressed under separate headings: “A) Missing scenario: template-save (template-based report save semantics)” and “B) Missing scenario: report-builder loading (prompt element loading after double-click)”, with supporting fixture references (BCIN-7667/BCIN-7669 for template-save; BCIN-7727 for builder loading) and explicit statements that these were missed in Phase 4a.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md frames the evaluation as a Phase 4a issue throughout: it states “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a,” defines the benchmark “in Phase 4a terms… explicit state transitions and observable verification leaves,” and includes a “Phase 4a alignment check (contract-fit)” concluding “This is consistent with a Phase 4a failure mode, not a Phase 4b grouping issue.”
